slides.title: Solution Architecture
slides.content:
Frontend Layer: Frappe UI + Progressive Web App
    ↓
Application Layer: ERPNext + Python + MariaDB
    ↓
Integration Layer: REST API + Webhooks + Message Queue
    ↓
Data Layer: MariaDB + Redis Cache + Backup
    ↓
Infrastructure: AWS/Azure + Load Balancer + CDN

note.text: Modern, scalable architecture supporting 1000+ concurrent users
Balanced team with both technical and business expertise
